goal.summary: Use Canva presentations as an image repository, extract images from exported presentation files, caption them, map them to related documents, and regenerate presentation assets from image plus caption records.

pipeline_overview.summary: Treat Canva presentation as the upstream asset store and export or download a presentation file when needed.
Extract embedded images from the presentation file.
Generate or refine captions for extracted images.
Store per-image path, caption, status, and rename candidate records in a JSON-friendly registry.
Compute image embeddings, retrieve candidate documents, and rerank top matches.
Review captions and mapping candidates, mark outliers, and write manual descriptions when needed.
After approval, rename image files using caption-based candidates and optionally write metadata.
Generate presentation artifacts from curated image plus caption records.

manual_review_steps.name: review_caption_quality
manual_review_steps.summary: Check whether each generated caption is appropriate for the image.

manual_review_steps.name: edit_bad_caption
manual_review_steps.summary: Manually revise captions when the generated caption is not suitable.

manual_review_steps.name: review_reranker_top5
manual_review_steps.summary: Review the reranker top-5 image-to-document mapping candidates.

manual_review_steps.name: decide_mapping_or_outlier
manual_review_steps.summary: Select the final related document mapping or label the image as an outlier.

manual_review_steps.name: write_manual_outlier_description
manual_review_steps.summary: Write a manual description for outlier images when no related document is appropriate.

subagent_pattern.main_thread_completion_rule: Treat MCP state as the source of truth rather than free-form worker text.

artifact_preferences.batch_helper_usage: If CSV fan-out is used, keep rows minimal and read full payloads from MCP-backed JSON records.

future_skill_targets.name: presentation-image-pipeline
future_skill_targets.purpose: Skill that orchestrates the MCP-first presentation image pipeline.

future_skill_targets.name: image-worker
future_skill_targets.purpose: Custom subagent that handles one image at a time with isolated context.
